hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'git push'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Never push without explicit user instruction. Pushing triggers Vercel production deploy. Commit only, then report the hash.' && exit 1; fi

echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import json,sys,os; d=json.load(sys.stdin); f=d.get('file_path',''); ext=os.path.splitext(f)[1]; print('SQL change detected - run: bun run types') if ext=='.sql' else None" 2>/dev/null || true
